title: Latest Releases (4.4.3 and 4.4.4) are not available on quay.io
body:
### Issue Description

Latest Releases (4.4.3 and 4.4.4) are not available on quay.io.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Try pulling `quay.io/containers/podman:v4.4.3`


### Describe the results you received

Image not found

### Describe the results you expected

Image found

### podman info output

```yaml
irrelevant
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
Please see the description in https://quay.io/repository/containers/podman

Images are build using the stable fedora repos, so we wait until podman lands in the latest fedora release before we can build the image. AFAIK new images are build every 24 hours.
